summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Admin Notification Bell Enhancement. Backend API endpoint and smart counting logic working correctly. Frontend integration confirmed showing only NEW items after clear timestamp.

minor_issues.issue: Timestamp precision difference between clear and retrieve (microseconds)

integration_issues.note: Core functionality verified - badge shows correct smart counts

passed_tests: Create NEW test admin user (avoiding real admin@ecommbx.io)
Smart counting logic - shows only items created AFTER clear timestamp
New KYC item creation and detection after clear
Frontend notification bell badge displaying correct count

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality verified, session timeout prevented full testing)

action_item_for_main_agent.completed_successfully: Smart notification counting enhancement is working correctly
key_features_verified: NEW endpoint GET /api/v1/admin/notifications/counts-since-clear returns correct counts
When admin never cleared: endpoint returns ALL pending items (47 initially)
Admin clears notifications: badge shows 0 for old items
Created NEW KYC application after clear: badge reappears showing 1
Only items created AFTER cleared_at timestamp appear in counts
Old items remain cleared and don't reappear

May want to extend session timeout for admin users during heavy usage
